title: brief_distill
description: Result of the per-turn brief-writer pass: it rewrites 001-brief.md in place from the discovery so far and reports a crisp one-line idea + a note on what changed.

idea.description: A crisp 1-2 sentence problem/idea statement synthesised from the discovery so far — the short pitch the downstream overlap / draft rooms read (world.proposal_idea).

note.description: One line: what changed in the brief this pass (e.g. 'filled What-changes; still missing the Kind').
